---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a consent-safe CLI improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What shopping, research, export, or agent workflow should this improve?

## Proposed Command or Behavior

```bash
zap ...
```

## Data Source

Which consent-safe source would this use?

- [ ] Official ZAP RSS
- [ ] Explicit public product page by numeric `modelId`
- [ ] Local cache or watchlist data
- [ ] Browser handoff URL generated for the user
- [ ] Other public source:

## Safety Check

- [ ] This request does not require blocked search/filter/sort crawling.
- [ ] This request does not require account, checkout, cart, payment, redirect, tracking, private API, cookie/session, HAR, or auth-replay flows.
- [ ] The output can be represented as JSON or another documented export format.

## עברית

אפשר להציע יכולות גם בעברית. נא לוודא שההצעה נשארת בתוך גבולות הבטיחות של הפרויקט.
